item.title: Development AI
item.shortDescription: AI-powered development tools and workflows for accelerating software development and automating coding tasks.
item.description: A set of experiments around how artificial intelligence can improve software development workflows.
item.whatItIs: A working set of AI-assisted development workflows for research, coding, review, and QA.
item.whyIMadeIt: I want to build faster without outsourcing taste, judgment, or responsibility.
item.whatILearned: The best AI workflow is still a human workflow with better feedback loops.
item.nextStep: Write up the strongest patterns and connect them to the technical skills archive.
item.documentaryLead: This project tracks how I actually use AI while building: where it speeds me up, where it makes me lazy, and where the human taste layer still matters most.
item.currentQuestion: What parts of building should be delegated, and what parts should stay stubbornly human?

proofArtifacts.label: Working loop
proofArtifacts.value: Research, plan, implement, review, QA, then tighten the product judgment.

proofArtifacts.label: Standard
proofArtifacts.value: Speed only counts if the final thing is clearer, more useful, and easier to maintain.

buildLog.title: Separated speed from taste
buildLog.note: The tool can draft, inspect, and verify. It still needs a person deciding what is worth making.

item.summary: AI-powered development tools and workflows for accelerating software development and automating coding tasks.
